ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue or pull request */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue or pull request was created */,
  "merge_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue or pull request was merged (if applicable) */,
  "is_pr" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the issue is a pull request */,
  "number_of_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the issue or pull request */,
  "closed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the issue or pull request is closed */,
  "number_of_labels" INTEGER /* Number of labels associated with the issue or pull request */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the issue or pull request */,
  "label_status" TEXT /* Status of the labels associated with the issue or pull request */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the issue or pull request */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the milestone associated with the issue or pull request */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the issue or pull request */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., bug, feature, task) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time required to complete the issue */,
  "remaining_time" INTEGER /* Remaining time required to complete the issue */,
  "original_estimate" INTEGER /* Original estimated time required to complete the issue */,
  "parent_issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent issue (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue or pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_milestone_id FOREIGN KEY ("milestone_id") REFERENCES milestones ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, tester) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "milestone_title" TEXT /* Title of the milestone */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the milestone */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_labels" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue or pull request */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label associated with the issue or pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue or pull request the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue or pull request the activity is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., created, updated, closed) */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., issue, comment, label) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the milestone associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "milestone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_issues" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue or pull request associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_project_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., issue, milestone, project) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "analytics_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics data */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics data (e.g., issue, milestone, project) */,
  "analytics_data" TEXT /* Data for the analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
